commands.review_summary:
The PR widens the virtual Clack note output to the widest already wrapped line and adds a rendered-output regression test for copy-sensitive session-lock paths.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +28. Total +36 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main routes session-lock lines through note(), and @clack/prompts 1.4.0 wraps final note content using getColumns(output) - 6. I did not run a live openclaw doctor command in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - Maintainer review should pick the canonical branch between this PR and the open sibling; there is no automated repair needed for this PR branch.
